creator: jhelfman@e-e.com
text:
--4ZLFUWh1odzi/v6L
 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=us-ascii; format=flowed
 Content-Disposition: inline
 
 A bug I had submitted the other day, I was able to patch without finding any
 new issues introduced with the patch I've written.
 
 -jgh
 
 --4ZLFUWh1odzi/v6L
 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=us-ascii
 Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="patch.txt"
 
 --- xpad-3.1/src/xpad-pad.c	2009-01-11 08:27:39.000000000 -0800
 +++ xpad-3.1/src/xpad-pad.c	2010-06-09 16:37:42.000000000 -0700
 @@ -274,7 +274,7 @@
  		"gravity", GDK_GRAVITY_STATIC, /* static gravity makes saving pad x,y work */
  		"skip-pager-hint", !xpad_settings_get_has_decorations (xpad_settings ()),
  		"skip-taskbar-hint", !xpad_settings_get_has_decorations (xpad_settings ()),
 -		"type", GTK_WINDOW_TOPLEVEL,
 +		//"type", GTK_WINDOW_TOPLEVEL,
  		"type-hint", GDK_WINDOW_TYPE_HINT_NORMAL,
  		"window-position", GTK_WIN_POS_MOUSE,
  		"child", vbox,
 
 --4ZLFUWh1odzi/v6L--
